# Code Signing Architecture Flags

**API Collection**

Use these supplemental flags to get static code.

## Overview

These flags supplement the flags described in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCSFlags]. Use these additional constants with the `flags` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopyStaticCode(_:_:_:)] function.

## Constants

- **kSecCSUseAllArchitectures**: Flag for requesting all architectures.
title: Code Signing Architecture Flags
